/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/xiaox_interfaces/srv/detail/init_device__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/xiaox_interfaces/srv/detail/read_joints__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/xiaox_interfaces/srv/detail/write_joints__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jiehuang/xiaoxbot/ros2/xiaox_ws/build/xiaox_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
